title.v: thông tin bảo hiểm, công đoàn
title.e: Employee Insurance and Union Due Information

command.text:
declare @extTable varchar(32), @l1 int, @l2 int, @lSI int, @lHI int, @lDescription int, @s varchar(128) select @extTable = 'hrttbh' select @lSI = prec from syscolumns where name = 'si_no' and id = object_id(@extTable) select @lHI = prec from syscolumns where name = 'hi_no' and id = object_id(@extTable) select @lDescription = prec from syscolumns where name = 'quyen_loi' and id = object_id(@extTable) select @l1 = prec from syscolumns where name = 'ma_so_bhxh' and id = object_id(@extTable) select @l2 = prec from syscolumns where name = 'ma_so_hgd' and id = object_id(@extTable)
select @s = rtrim(@lSI) + ',' + rtrim(@lHI) + ',' + rtrim(@lDescription) + ',' + rtrim(@l1)+ ',' + rtrim(@l2)
select 'set$ExternalMaxLengthFields(this, ''' + @s + ''');' as message return

declare @cookie varchar(32), @ma_so_bhxh char(32), @ma_so_hgd char(32), @si_no char(32), @si_date smalldatetime, @si_date2 smalldatetime, @hi_no char(32), @hi_date smalldatetime, @hi_date2 smalldatetime, @noi_kham varchar(16), @quyen_loi nvarchar(128), @ten_bac_ql nvarchar(128), @ten_bac_ql2 nvarchar(128), @ten_kcb nvarchar(128), @ten_kcb2 nvarchar(128), @ten_tinh nvarchar(128), @ten_tinh2 nvarchar(128) select @cookie = convert(varchar(19), a.datetime2, 121), @ten_tinh = b.ten_tinh, @ten_tinh2 = b.ten_tinh2, @ten_bac_ql = c.ten_bac, @ten_bac_ql2 = c.ten_bac2 from hrnv a left join hrdmtinh b on a.cmnd_noi_cap = b.ma_tinh left join hrdmbql c on a.bac_quan_ly = c.ma_bac where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec
if exists(select 1 from hrttbh where stt_rec = @stt_rec) select @ma_so_bhxh = a.ma_so_bhxh, @ma_so_hgd = a.ma_so_hgd, @si_no = a.si_no, @si_date = a.si_date, @si_date2 = a.si_date2, @hi_no = a.hi_no, @hi_date = a.hi_date, @hi_date2 = a.hi_date2, @noi_kham = a.noi_kham, @ten_kcb = k.ten_kcb, @ten_kcb2 = k.ten_kcb2, @quyen_loi = a.quyen_loi from hrttbh a left join hrdmkcb k on a.noi_kham = k.ma_kcb where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec else select @si_no = '', @si_date = null, @si_date2 = null, @hi_no = '', @hi_date = null, @hi_date2 = null, @noi_kham = '', @ten_kcb = '', @ten_kcb2 = '', @quyen_loi = ''
select isnull(rtrim(@ma_so_bhxh), '') as ma_so_bhxh, isnull(rtrim(@ma_so_hgd), '') as ma_so_hgd, rtrim(@si_no) as si_no, @si_date as si_date, @si_date2 as si_date2, rtrim(@hi_no) as hi_no, @hi_date as hi_date, @hi_date2 as hi_date2, rtrim(@noi_kham) as noi_kham, rtrim(@quyen_loi) as quyen_loi, @ten_bac_ql as ten_bac_ql, @ten_bac_ql2 as ten_bac_ql2, @ten_kcb as ten_kcb, @ten_kcb2 as ten_kcb2, @ten_tinh as ten_tinh, @ten_tinh2 as ten_tinh2, @cookie as cookie return

if exists (select 1 from hrttbh where stt_rec = @stt_rec) begin update hrttbh set ma_so_bhxh = @$ma_so_bhxh, ma_so_hgd = @$ma_so_hgd, si_no = @$si_no, si_date = @$si_date, si_date2 = @$si_date2, hi_no = @$hi_no, hi_date = @$hi_date, hi_date2 = @$hi_date2, noi_kham = @$noi_kham, quyen_loi = @$quyen_loi, datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where stt_rec = @stt_rec end else begin insert into hrttbh (stt_rec, ma_so_bhxh, ma_so_hgd, si_no, si_date, si_date2, hi_no, hi_date, hi_date2, noi_kham, quyen_loi, datetime0, datetime2, user_id0, user_id2) select @stt_rec, @$ma_so_bhxh, @$ma_so_hgd, @$si_no, @$si_date, @$si_date2, @$hi_no, @$hi_date, @$hi_date2, @$noi_kham, @$quyen_loi, getdate(), getdate(), @@userID, @@userID end if $hrttctxh.NewValue <> $hrttctxh.OldValue begin update @hrttctxh set stt_rec = @stt_rec delete hrttctxh where stt_rec = @stt_rec insert into hrttctxh select * from @hrttctxh end if $hrttctyt.NewValue <> $hrttctyt.OldValue begin update @hrttctyt set stt_rec = @stt_rec delete hrttctyt where stt_rec = @stt_rec insert into hrttctyt select * from @hrttctyt end if $hrttcttn.NewValue <> $hrttcttn.OldValue begin update @hrttcttn set stt_rec = @stt_rec delete hrttcttn where stt_rec = @stt_rec insert into hrttcttn select * from @hrttcttn end if $hrttctcd.NewValue <> $hrttctcd.OldValue begin update @hrttctcd set stt_rec = @stt_rec delete hrttctcd where stt_rec = @stt_rec insert into hrttctcd select * from @hrttctcd end if $hrttctdtbh.NewValue <> $hrttctdtbh.OldValue begin update @hrttctdtbh set stt_rec = @stt_rec delete hrttctdtbh where stt_rec = @stt_rec insert into hrttctdtbh select * from @hrttctdtbh end if $hrhgd.NewValue <> $hrhgd.OldValue begin update @hrhgd set stt_rec = @stt_rec update @hrhgd set ho_khau_tinh = '', ho_khau_quan = '', ho_khau_phuong = '', dien_thoai = '', loai_so = '', ho_khau_so = '' where chu_ho <> 1 delete hrhgd where stt_rec = @stt_rec insert into hrhgd select * from @hrhgd end /*
